_comment: Alignment config for W45 building (Vectorworks IFC4). South facade balconies face camera (opposite staircase side).

south_facade._comment: South facade with balconies (no staircase) faces camera after 180° rotation.

building_transform._comment: Rotated 180° so south facade (balconies, no staircase) faces camera. Pushed forward so balcony slabs align under railings.
